title: phaenopyrum odoratissimum
intro: Phaenopyrum odoratissimum, also known as sweetgum, is a deciduous tree native to Asia and is a member of the Sapindaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum odoratissimum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Phaenopyrum odoratissimum include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
